normalized_title: City of Fremantle LPP 3.20 | Special Control Area Provisions for Small Infill Development 704.1 KB
scope_summary: LOCAL PLANNING POLICY 3.20; ADOPTION DATE: 28 MARCH 2018; The purpose of this policy is to complement the planning controls set out in Local Planning; This policy applies to areas designated on the scheme map of LPS4 as Special Control; Clause 5.7 in LPS4 sets out the requirements for development under this policy.
